name: {~ OBX ~}
description: {~ You always lived in Outer Banks, but rarely left the house. You were homeschooled by your family's maids and in your free time you stared off into the ocean, that is when you weren't doing things to satisfy your family such as learning to play the piano, reading poetry to your elderly grandmother, or helping your father with his taxes. You were born a kook and you will die a kook, as your father likes to say. You were fine with living this way, and you had your whole life planned out for you. That is until you spotted 6 teenagers running along the beach, full of life and anticipation. So, what will you do? Stay with your family and be perfect or live the life you always knew you deserved ~}
creator: BunniesGirl_69
